name: paracci-frontend
description: Frontend assets builder for Paracci Secure Messaging

scripts.build: esbuild frontend/purify.js --bundle --minify --outfile=paracci/app/static/js/lib/purify.min.js && esbuild frontend/marked.js --bundle --minify --outfile=paracci/app/static/js/lib/marked.min.js && esbuild frontend/highlight.js --bundle --minify --outfile=paracci/app/static/js/lib/highlight.min.js
